title: cistanthe anceps
intro: Cistanthe anceps, also known as star lily or star gentian, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to their antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cistanthe anceps include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Cistanthe anceps can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice for external use, and its roots can be dried and made into capsules for internal consumption.
